metadata.description: Delegation-style plugins for Claude Code: hand code review and coding tasks to GLM-5.2 and other Ollama Cloud models while Claude keeps driving on your Anthropic model.

plugins.name: glm
plugins.description: Delegate code review and coding tasks to GLM-5.2 (1M context, via Ollama Cloud) from Claude Code, while Claude keeps driving on your Anthropic model.

plugins.name: ollama
plugins.description: Delegate code review and coding tasks to any Ollama Cloud model (GLM, Qwen3-Coder, DeepSeek, Kimi, ...) from Claude Code, while Claude keeps driving on your Anthropic model.
